statement: Use IBM Plex Sans Hebrew consistently for Hebrew prose and UI labels across the public homepage, blog, and changelog; reserve IBM Plex Mono for code, identifiers, language codes, and the Latin hunch wordmark.
rationale: The user reported inconsistent Hebrew typography, then explicitly chose to keep Plex. The mismatch came from Noto Sans Hebrew on blog/changelog templates and Latin-monospace fallbacks on localized UI labels.
